summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Cyber Security Services (CSS) is an independent cybersecurity consulting firm based in Ohio that provides penetration testing, virtual CISO, incident response, SOC, and compliance services (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI, etc.) to U.S. organizations, including Fortune 100 companies. They contributed to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework and focus on risk, compliance, and business resilience.
